questions.text: When you're learning a new language (currently Spanish), do you prefer immersion-based learning (speaking with natives, watching content without subtitles) or structured lessons (grammar drills, apps like Duolingo)? What has worked best for you so far?
What does your ideal morning look like from the moment you wake up until you start work? Walk me through your routine — coffee first? Exercise? Reading? Just coffee and jump into calls?

When you buy clothes, are you more of an 'invest in one quality piece' person or a 'find something decent at a reasonable price and replace later' person? How do you balance durability with the reality of travel wear and tear?
What are your preferences when it comes to weather and climate? Do you like it dry or humid? How hot is too hot for you? Do you seek out places with distinct seasons or prefer year-round consistency?

What does your ideal vacation or extended break look like? Are you someone who plans every detail in advance, or do you prefer to figure it out as you go? Big city exploration, beach relaxation, adventure sports, or visiting friends and family?
